summary: Completed testing of WaveWatch streaming platform features including homepage, navigation, theme picker, search functionality, and content pages. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend mostly working with some admin access issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login form not working - credentials filled but login fails silently

integration_issues.issue: Search filters only show Films and Series, missing TV, Music, Games, Software, Ebooks filters

missing_features.issue: Cannot test drag&drop functionality due to admin login failure
Sports-Stream and LiveWatch promo sections not visible on homepage

passed_tests: Backend API health check and all endpoints (18/18 tests passed)
Homepage loads with hero section and content
Media dropdown contains LiveWatch and Sports-Stream links
Theme picker displays new themes (Cyberpunk, Monochrome, Estival) with NEW badges
Individual search bars removed from Games, Music, Ebooks, Software pages
Global search functionality works with suggestions
Retrogaming page loads correctly and ready for grid display
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin login functionality to enable testing of admin modules with drag&drop. Add missing content type filters to global search (TV, Music, Games, Software, Ebooks). Ensure promotional sections (Sports-Stream, LiveWatch) are visible on homepage.

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (most features working, admin login and some search filters missing)
